subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon! Hearken unto the rustling of the Divine Lote-Tree, for verily it draweth thee near unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایتها المقبله الی الافق الاعلی اسمعی حفیف سدره المنتهی انه یقربک الی الله
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
